name: web-design
description: Web product workflows for Vercel deployment, React and UI best practices, Stripe integrations, and Supabase/Postgres guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Web product workflows across deployment, React, UI review, payments, and database design
interface.longDescription: Web product workflows for deploying projects to Vercel, applying React and Next.js performance guidance, reviewing UI work against web design guidelines, composing interfaces with shadcn/ui guidance, designing or reviewing Stripe integrations, and applying Supabase/Postgres best practices for schema and query performance, all with plugin-local Vercel, Stripe, and Supabase MCP support.
interface.defaultPrompt: Review this web app's UI, improve the React implementation, and help deploy it.
